name: CHEATER || Kaew Nanwidhan
description:
—broken promises.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

drugs and alcohol were never Kaew’s thing, never even thought of them. she contented herself with being sober, aware of her surroundings.

but all it took was a few persuading friends and a pretty face to get her completely wasted. and before she knew it— she awoke to the smell of cheap perfume, splitting headache and missed calls.
